code:
stateDiagram-v2

    state ForkState <<fork>>
    state JoinState <<join>>

    GUIProcess: Process for displaying
 GUI is started
    GUIInit: GUI initializes data interface
 and components
    GUI: GUI is opened and shows
 list of stocks
    ReadData: Data interface reads
 relevant pickle file
    StockHandled: The data for the stock
 has been updated
    FindStock: Find stock with mising data
    DataGathererProcess: Process for gathering
 data is started
    WriteData: Data is written to
 pickle file
    DataGatherer: DataGatherer scrapes
 webpages
    GatherData: Stock data is gathered

    [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> ForkState: Program is started
    ForkState --> GUIProcess
    ForkState --> DataGathererProcess
    GUIProcess --> JoinState
    DataGathererProcess --> GatherData
    GatherData --> WriteData
    WriteData --> JoinState
    JoinState --> GUIInit: Data exists in file
    GUIInit --> ReadData: GUI requests data
    ReadData --> GUI: Data interface returns data
    GUI --> UpdateData: Every 500ms
    GUI --> RefreshData: User requests data
 to be updated
    GUI --> FilterData: User creates a filter
    GUI --> SortData: User requests data
 to be sorted
    GUI --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]: User closes GUI
    StockHandled --> GUI: Tell the GUI that new
 data is available
    RefreshButton --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data
    Filter --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data
    Sort --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data

    state RefreshData {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> RefreshButton
    }

    state SortData {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> Sort: Send column and sort direction
 to data interface
    }

    state FilterData {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> Filter: Send filter type to
 data interface
    }

    state UpdateData {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> FindStock
        FindStock --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]: No stock found
        FindStock --> DataGatherer: Send stock to data
 gathering process
        DataGatherer --> StockHandled
    }
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个医疗科技股票监控系统的状态图。核心场景是：当程序从HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault启动后，要分叉成两个并行流程——一个负责GUI展示，另一个负责数据采集。
明白，ForkState作为分叉点，然后两个子流程最终在JoinState汇合？汇合后的条件是什么？
对，JoinState汇合的前提是数据采集流程已经完成了GatherData和WriteData，把股票数据写入pickle文件。汇合后进入GUIInit，提示'Data exists in file'。
好的，我先把主干画出来：从Vault启动，分叉到GUIProcess和DataGathererProcess，采集流程经过GatherData、WriteData后与GUIProcess在JoinState汇合，然后初始化GUI。
GUI运行后有几个关键交互：每500ms自动UpdateData，用户也可以主动RefreshData、FilterData或SortData。另外关闭GUI时要同步到HealthTech_EMR_Sync。
这些交互都是GUI直接触发的吗？UpdateData的具体逻辑是什么？
UpdateData是个复合状态，里面用HealthTech_LabAnalyzer触发FindStock，如果没找到就从PatientRecords反馈，找到了就发给DataGatherer去采集，最后StockHandled通知GUI有新数据。
UpdateData子状态图画好了。那RefreshData、FilterData、SortData这三个也需要展开吗？
是的，但结构简单些。RefreshData里用DiagnosticEngine触发RefreshButton；SortData里EMR_Sync发送排序参数给Sort；FilterData里PatientRecords发送过滤条件给Filter。这三个最后都把结果返回给GUI。
等等，SortData和FilterData里我标注的是HealthTech_EMR_Sync和HealthTech_PatientRecords作为起点，但之前UpdateData里PatientRecords是终点。确认一下PatientRecords在FilterData里是起点发送过滤条件，对吗？
确认，FilterData里PatientRecords是起点，发送filter type。另外StockHandled到GUI的箭头也要补上，表示通知新数据可用。
全部完成了。整个流程：Vault启动→分叉并行→采集数据写入文件→汇合初始化→GUI展示→支持定时更新、手动刷新、过滤、排序→关闭时同步EMR。所有子状态和跳转关系都已落实。
